runTitle: Cloud Tasks Job Dispatch Fresh Browser Production Recheck - v8.11.58

aiLatencyObservations.surface: Cloud Tasks async job fresh browser UI recheck

expertAssessments.rationale: Cloud Tasks queue state, production health, dispatch 201, and SSE completion confirm the async job infrastructure path works within the current free-tier guardrails.
The final answer did not preserve the DISK >=70% threshold and dashboard metric values even though the Cloud Tasks path completed.
expertAssessments.nextAction: Add/fix deterministic metric grounding or final answer threshold validation for async job responses.

expertAssessments.rationale: The recheck used a fresh browser session, UI-only CSRF-safe submission, Performance API EventSource evidence, and durable screenshot/summary artifacts.

usageChecks.summary: Current billing period checked after Cloud Tasks fresh browser recheck; effective $18.4121, billed $0.0000, no unexpected billed usage.
Queue openmanager-ai-jobs is RUNNING with 1 dispatch/sec, 2 max concurrent dispatches, and maxAttempts=3.
usageChecks.evidence: gcloud tasks queues describe openmanager-ai-jobs --location asia-northeast1 --format=json

wontFixImprovements.title: AI async job answer should preserve DISK >=70% threshold and dashboard metric values
wontFixImprovements.evidence: Dashboard top5 showed db-mysql-dc1-backup DISK 74% and db-mysql-dc1-primary DISK 63%; final answer reported backup as 68% and mentioned 59.4%/58% servers in the threshold analysis.
wontFixImprovements.note: Cloud Tasks dispatch/SSE passed; this is answer quality/data grounding drift.
wontFixImprovements.policyNote: 포트폴리오 운영성 우선 규칙: 비차단 항목은 과도한 개선을 방지하기 위해 WONT-FIX 처리합니다.

notes: Initial rerun used a fresh browser session and dashboard timer was 29:57, but previous AI conversation history persisted. A clean new chat was then started before the recorded dispatch.
Clean new chat had afterNewChatMessageCount=0 before the recorded query.
Recorded job def72ab5-c218-40ad-89b2-d716893c46f7 completed through POST /api/ai/jobs 201 and one EventSource stream entry.
No high-volume Cloud Tasks load test was executed.
